title: Workflow — draft complete post-mortem from incident data
code_snippet:
# User provides: PagerDuty alerts, Grafana screenshots, Slack thread,
# git log showing the deploy, and says:
# 'Write a post-mortem for the payment outage yesterday. SEV-2.
# Duration was about 47 minutes. ~12K users affected.'
expected_feedback: Workflow: Draft mode + Standard depth (SEV-2). (1) Gate 1: incident context collected from PagerDuty + Grafana + Slack + git. (2) Gate 2: verify blameless framing. (3) Timeline: extract UTC entries from all sources, mark DETECTION/RESPONSE/RECOVERY phases. (4) Root cause: 5-Why analysis to systemic level. (5) Impact: quantify from provided data. (6) Action items: categorized (prevent/detect/mitigate), owned, deadlined. (7) Scorecard: Critical 3/3, Standard 4/5, Hygiene 3/4.
